a-na x x x ⸢d30⸣ ša₂ ŠA₃ ⸢iriKASKALki⸣ [...]

(o 6') To ... Sin that, inside Harran, [...]

o 7'7'

dan-na-⸢ni?⸣-šu₂ a-mur ⸢pa⸣-laḫ₃ ⸢DINGIR⸣tu₂-šu₂ [...]

(o 7') I saw [...] of his power. [...] fearing his divinity.

o 8'8'

itiDU₆ ši-gu-u-šu₂ ina ŠU-MIN-ia₂ aṣ-⸢bat⸣-[ma]

(o 8') In the month of Tašritu, I seized the šigūšu-barley in my hands [and] performed a festival on the 8th day of Tašritu with good joyful songs.

o 9'9'

i-si-nu ina itiDU₆ U₄ 8-KAM ina ni-gu-tu₂ ⸢DU₁₀⸣.GAa e-⸢pu⸣-[uš]

o 10'10'

ina u₄-me-šu₂-ma 23 UDU.NITA₂-MEŠ 2 GU₄.NITA₂-MEŠ 2 AMAR.GU₄-MEŠ

(o 10') At that time: 23 rams, 2 oxen 2 bull calves for burnt offerings on incense burners, morning and evening;

o 11'11'

a-na še-ḫa-a-ti ma-aq-lu-a-ti še-ri₃ nu-bat-ti

o 12'12'

20 giš⸢BANŠUR⸣-MEŠ ⸢tal⸣-lul-te ša₂ šeIMGAGA

(o 12') 20 offering tables laid with emmer-wheat;

o 13'13'

6 ANŠE gišGEŠTIN 1 ŠE gišGEŠTIN maš-⸢qi⸣-i ša₂ ḪA AN

(o 13') 6 imēru of wine, 1 pānu of wine for sprinkling-vessels of ...

o 14'14'

3(BAN₂) I₃ 3(BAN₂) LAL₃ a-na gi-ne₂-⸢e⸣ 3(BAN₂) I₃ 3(BAN₂) ⸢KAŠ?⸣ gur-nu

(o 14') 3 sūtu of oil, 3 sūtu of honey for the regular contribution, 3 sūtu of oil, 3 sūtu of average-quality beer for the offering.

o 15'15'

a-na ⸢SISKUR₂?⸣ ina itiAB [x] UDU.⸢NITA₂⸣ 1 ANŠE gišGEŠTIN

(o 15') In the month of Ṭebetu, [...] ram, 1 imēru of wine, 1 qû of oil, 1 qû of honey. In the month of Addaru, [1] lamb, [1] ram, 1 imēru 9 sūtu of [wine],

o 16'16'

1 SILA₃ I₃ 1 SILA₃ LAL₃ ina iti⸢ŠE?⸣ [1] ⸢SILA₄?⸣ [1] UDU.⸢NITA₂⸣ 1 ANŠE 3(BAN₂) [gišGEŠTIN]

o 17'17'

2 SILA₃ I₃ 2 SILA₃ LAL₃ [PAP] an-⸢nu⸣-u KEŠ₂ ina muḫ-ḫi

(o 17') 2 qû of oil, 2 qû of honey. In addition established [all] this ritual assemblage in Huzirina.

o 18'18'

⸢ina⸣ iri⸢ḫu⸣-zir-na [ar₂]-ku-us! E₂ 30 ⸢ANŠE⸣ A.⸢ŠA₃⸣ [...]

(o 18') An estate of 30 imēru of field [...]

aš-šur-a-aki ina ⸢lib₃-bi!⸣ u-še-⸢šeb⸣

x x x DI x x TU₂ maḫ-de-e!(A)

r 99

ina u₄!-me-šu₂-⸢ma⸣ mGIN—dIM SANGA dIŠKUR ša₂ iriBAL.TILki

(r 9) At that time, I appointed Ken-Adad, the priest of Adad of Aššur, as priest inside. I placed craftsmen under the authority of Ken-Adad the priest.

r 1010

a-na lu₂SANGA ina lib₃-bi ap-qid!-di

r 1111

mGIN—10 SANGA DUMU-MEŠ! um-ma-nu ana ⸢ŠU⸣-MIN-šu₂ ⸢aš⸣-kun

r 1212

⸢a⸣-mi₃-ri E₂.KUR la i-la-mad lu₂⸢I₃.DU₈⸣-MEŠ

(r 12) The visitor should not learn about the sanctuary. They are the gatekeepers of the gods' temple.

ša₂ E₂ DINGIR šu₂-nu E₂.KUR šu₂-a-⸢te⸣ E₂! [...]

a-na TI.LA ZI-MEŠ-ia₂ GID₂!.[DA ...]

r 1616

⸢ša₂ LU₂⸣-MEŠ šu₂-nu-ti EREN₂.MAN-[MEŠ la id-du]-⸢nu⸣

(r 16) Royal troops will not be given from those men. They will not be bound by contract.
